comments.body: What's the rationale for moving this instead of making it public?

The interfaces in buildah were fund (b *builder) and @QiWang19 copied and rewrote them for the podman-cp command, so I figured they were calling the chrootarchive util package so it made sense to move them there, and pull out the buidah specific calls.

They certainly are not buildah specific.
Hmm, Red Hat CI isn't happy anywhere ATM.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably e702872) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat 
One is supposed to be using a chroot while the other does not.
